official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound set_health fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official health, food, and saturation body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_health to packet id 0x68.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the set_health id to ClientboundSetHealthPacket.
The official set_health body is health float, food VarInt, then saturation float.
The fixture uses primitive health/food/saturation values only and does not require initialized player state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded health fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove player health state, UI behavior, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer player health state, UI behavior, or client-load completion.
